docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $109.50) SERVED SEP-01-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SOLOVIEV, MAX
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT IS ORDERED FULLY SATISFIED.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT SOLOVIEV, MAX ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO JUDGE MITCHELL FILED BY DEFENDANT SOLOVIEV, MAX
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SOLOVIEV, MAX
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JUN-02-2014
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,426.00 FILED BY MURPHY, SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT SOLOVIEV, MAX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2010 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURPHY, SARAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLOVIEV, MAX $5,786.00 PRINCIPAL, $184.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,970.50, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR LABOR AND MATERIALS TO RESTORE PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY. THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR PERSONAL PROPERTY LOSSES (MATTRESS, BOOTS, ETC) WAS SETTLED BY DEFENDANT'S PREVIOUS PAYMENT OF $1300.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES (3 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY DEFENDANT SOLOVIEV, MAX
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-15-2010 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
